Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories Set Two; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Kevin J. Hermanson; Request For Monetary Sanctions; And [Proposed] Order
Off Calendar Sep-25-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MOLLIE'S STONE MARKETS' Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories Set Two; Request For Monetary Sanctions.

Granted unopposed. Plaintiff to serve verified responses to Special Interrogatories, Set #2 by October 15, 2020. Request for sanctions granted in the amount of $460 against plaintiff and is due by October 15, 2020. Check to be made payable to the Client Trust Fund of Santana and Vierra. Defendant to prepare proposed order and email it to the Judge Pro Tem at klgallo@discoveryreferee.com

Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Gallo, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
